heading: Capitol Grounds shuttle service
label: 2163 Capitol Grounds shuttle service
text: Funds appropriated for any available account of the Architect of the Capitol after , shall be available for the purchase or rental, maintenance and operation of passenger motor vehicles to provide shuttle service for Members and employees of Congress to and from the buildings in the Legislative group.October 1, 1976
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 223 of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002

Amendments2017— substituted “appropriated for any available account of the Architect of the Capitol” for “appropriated under this heading”, which had been editorially changed to read “appropriated for the Capitol Grounds” to reflect the heading appearing in the Act.Pub. L. 115–31

Effective Date of 2017 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 115–31, div. I, title I, § 1206(b)131 Stat. 582May 5, 2017“The amendment made by subsection (a) [amending this section] shall apply with respect to fiscal year 2017 and each succeeding fiscal year.”
